Description: Draft-Unassigned shift is assigned to an employee (Draft).
Shift is published without an assignment and bidding opens (Normal).
Unpublished draft is removed/cancelled.
Draft-Assigned employee is changed to a different employee.
Draft employee is removed; returns to Draft-Unassigned.
Direct assignment is published; enters the active roster (Confirmed).
Unpublished draft is removed/cancelled.
Employee accepts the direct offer.
Employee rejects the offer; shift enters bidding.
Offer hits 4h threshold without response; reverts to Draft-Unassigned.
Manager pulls the offer; shift reverts to Draft-Assigned.
Pending offer is cancelled/removed.
Employee requests to swap this shift.
Confirmed shift is cancelled.
Shift is removed from the roster.
Manager selects a winner from the bid pool.
Manager closes bidding without selecting a winner.
Shift enters 24h window; bidding priority becomes Urgent.
Bidding not won by 4h threshold; reverts to Draft-Unassigned.
Manager removes from bidding; shift reverts to Draft-Unassigned.
Manager selects a winner from the urgent bid pool.
Urgent bidding closed without winner.
Urgent bidding expired; reverts to Draft-Unassigned.
Emergency assignment cancelled.
Closed bidding shift returned to draft.
Another employee accepts the trade request.
Manager approves the trade; shift reassigned to new employee.
Employee clocks in (already in progress).
Employee clocks out; shift completed.
Shift marked as no-show while in progress (manual).
Emergency re-assignment of an in-progress shift.
Emergency shift completed and clocked out.
System auto-completes shift after 12.5 hours.
Draft shift past start time is expired.
